title: T-027 — Manual put-away service (P1)
prompt:
# T-027 — Manual put-away service

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §8.3 (FR-WH-012).
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
`putawayLp(lpId, targetLocationId)` Server Action recording move_type='putaway' from receiving zone to target storage location.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/putaway.ts`. Validate target location is descendant of LP.warehouse_id via ltree, target.active=true. Update LP.location_id; insert stock_moves(move_type='putaway'). P1 manual only — put-away rules deferred to P2.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/putaway.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/putaway.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a freshly-received LP at receiving location, when putawayLp runs to a storage location, then LP.location_id updates and a stock_moves(move_type='putaway') row is added.
2. Given target location is in a different warehouse, when putawayLp runs, then it returns a validation error.
3. Given target.active=false, when putawayLp runs, then V-WH-MOV-003 error is returned.

## Test strategy
- RED: putaway.test.ts covers happy path, cross-warehouse error, inactive target.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test putaway`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not introduce putaway rules (P2).
- Do not allow cross-warehouse putaway.
- Do not skip stock_moves insert.

pipeline_inputs.description: Manual put-away P1 — move LP to storage location and log putaway stock_move.
pipeline_inputs.details: Ltree descendant check; active check; single transaction. P2 putaway rules deferred.
acceptance_criteria: Given a freshly-received LP, when putawayLp runs to a storage location, then LP.location_id updates and a putaway stock_move is added
Given target in a different warehouse, when run, then a validation error returns
Given target.active=false, when run, then V-WH-MOV-003 error returns
test_strategy: RED: putaway.test.ts covers happy / cross-warehouse / inactive scenarios
